manual_entries.title: ABB Fieldbus Command Loss Warning Symptom
manual_entries.summary: The drive shows a fieldbus communication warning and remote command updates stop arriving from the controller.

zh.title: ABB 现场总线命令丢失告警现象
zh.summary: 变频器出现现场总线通讯告警，且来自控制器的远程命令刷新停止。

structured_payload.observed_condition: 现场总线通讯告警出现，远程控制命令刷新停止。
Fieldbus communication warning appears and remote control commands stop updating

chunk.cleaned_text: A7C1 communication warning appears and remote fieldbus commands stop updating at the drive.
chunk.text_excerpt: fieldbus communication warning and lost remote commands

evidence.evidence_text: 现场总线适配器通讯异常时，传动侧会出现通讯告警并丢失来自控制器的循环命令。

manual_entries.title: Siemens Motor Temperature Rise Before Trip Symptom
manual_entries.summary: Before the overtemperature fault trips, the drive indicates that motor temperature is rising abnormally and thermal protection is nearing its threshold.

zh.title: Siemens 跳闸前电机温度异常升高现象
zh.summary: 在过温故障跳闸前，变频器会表现为电机温度异常升高，热保护接近阈值。

structured_payload.observed_condition: 电机温度异常升高，热保护接近跳闸阈值。
Motor temperature rises abnormally and thermal protection approaches its trip threshold

chunk.cleaned_text: Before F07011 trips, motor temperature rises abnormally and thermal protection approaches the configured threshold.
chunk.text_excerpt: motor temperature rises abnormally before trip

evidence.evidence_text: 在 F07011 跳闸前，可观察到电机温度持续升高并逐步逼近热保护阈值。
